prompt: A full-body fashion-editorial street portrait of a modern-day Japanese delinquent schoolgirl vigilante standing wide-legged in the middle of a busy Tokyo entertainment district intersection, photographed from a slightly low angle for a bold heroic presence. She is a young Japanese woman with dark brown hair tied in a high ponytail with loose strands, wearing a white sailor-style school blouse with a navy collar and a large deep red bow, a short dark navy pleated skirt, an oversized black leather biker jacket, white crew socks, and chunky white sneakers with bright red laces. In one hand she loosely holds a metallic yo-yo hanging by its string as a signature weapon, while her other hand rests in her jacket pocket. The pose is confident, rebellious, and confrontational, like a contemporary reinterpretation of Sukeban Deka. Set the scene on a real urban Tokyo street with zebra crossing lines under her feet, cars stopped behind her, pedestrians along the sidewalks, and tall buildings packed with vertical Japanese shop signs and billboards fading into the background. Use shallow depth of field so the city remains recognizable but softly blurred, while the subject is crisp and centered. Lighting is bright natural daytime with soft contrast, realistic skin tones, premium fashion photography sharpness, and a cinematic urban cool-girl mood. Emphasize realism, high detail in the leather texture and pleated skirt, subtle wind in the ponytail, and a polished contemporary Japanese street-style aesthetic.
